abilities.name: anger-shell
abilities.shortEffect: When the Pokémon's HP drops below half, Anger Shell lowers its Defense and Special Defense but its Attack, Special Attack and Speed are raised.
abilities.effect: When an attack causes its HP to drop to half or less, the Pokémon gets angry. This lowers its Defense and Sp. Def stats but boosts its Attack, Sp. Atk, and Speed stats.
abilities.flavorText: When an attack causes its HP to drop to half or less, the Pokémon gets angry. This lowers its Defense and Sp. Def stats but boosts its Attack, Sp. Atk, and Speed stats.

abilities.name: shell-armor
abilities.effect: Moves cannot score critical hits against this Pokémon. This ability functions identically to Battle Armor.
abilities.flavorText: A hard shell protects the Pokémon from critical hits.

abilities.name: regenerator
abilities.shortEffect: Heals for 1/3 max HP upon switching out.
abilities.effect: This Pokémon regains 1/3 of its maximum HP when it is switched out for another Pokémon under any circumstances other than having fainted. This ability does not take effect when a battle ends.
abilities.flavorText: The Pokémon has a little of its HP restored when withdrawn from battle.
